title: phyllanthus novae-hollandiae
intro: Phyllanthus novae-hollandiae, also known as the rainforest tree or green gem, is a small tree native to Australia and New Guinea, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The leaves and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in medicine, particularly for their diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Phyllanthus novae-hollandiae is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, with its leaves often being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
